posts.name: ExploreYC
posts.tagline: Open-source API for Y Combinator & a16z company data
posts.description: One open-source API for startup data across Y Combinator AND a16z - 6,600+ companies with funding, stage, IPO/M&A exits, and founders. Filter by VC (yc/a16z/all), batch, industry, country, or search. Grab a free API key, read the docs (curl/Node/Python + Swagger), and build in 30 seconds. Plus the full web app: map, analytics, funding data, a live hiring board, and AI tools.

makers.name: Konstantin Borimechkov
makers.headline: swe by day & founder by night

posts.name: IvyForms
posts.tagline: A WordPress form builder for real workflows
posts.description: IvyForms is a WordPress form builder for turning submissions into structured workflows. Create contact forms, applications, registrations, surveys, feedback forms, and multi-step flows with a clean drag-and-drop builder. Then manage entries, analyze responses, apply conditional logic, and connect data to tools like wpDataTables, Amelia, Mailchimp, and webhooks so every response can move work forward.

posts.name: Willow Frontier Pro
posts.tagline: The fastest, most accurate dictation model in the world
posts.description: Willow is launching two new voice AI models: Willow Frontier Pro and Willow Frontier Mini. Frontier Pro is our most powerful dictation model. It is built for people who want fast, accurate, and polished writing anywhere they work. Frontier mini is lightweight and completely free to use. On our free plan, users get unlimited access to this model. It's faster and more accurate than other AI dictation tools.

posts.name: Bono AI
posts.tagline: Talk Once. Publish Everywhere.
posts.description: Meet Bono, your voice AI content strategist. Talk for 10 minutes, and Bono turns the conversation into a blog post, LinkedIn/X content, a newsletter, and more, all in your voice. No blank page, no prompts, no ghostwriters, no agencies.

posts.name: Link Preview API
posts.tagline: Free API to get Open Graph data, title & images for any URL
posts.description: Completely free. Get back everything you need to render a rich link card in your app – the kind you see in Slack, iMessage, or Twitter when someone pastes a link. Dedicated handling for popular websites like YouTube, Amazon, Twitter, Airbnb, SoundCloud, NYT, Vimeo, Giphy, and more. These return reliable, high-quality previews every time. Built in image validation, and JavaScript rendering. Works directly from the browser, no proxy server required. Free usage up to 20,000 link previews.

posts.name: Cutrix
posts.tagline: AI-powered video translation that preserves speaker's voice
posts.description: Stop settling for robotic dubbing. Cutrix uses an Agentic workflow to translate videos while preserving the speaker's original emotion and natural pacing. Experience hyper-natural alignment without the steep learning curve. Sign up for free credits today!

posts.name: LemonLime
posts.tagline: Automates your existing workflows with a single prompt.
posts.description: LemonLime lets teams automate their workflows in minutes with a single click. It connects to your existing tools, studies your business, and self-creates specialized AI agents and automations that support your team. Don’t know where to start?  LemonLime helps with that, too, automatically surfacing suggested automations that you can implement with a single click.

posts.name: Orbit for Mac
posts.tagline: Every Google account, in a single window
posts.description: Every Google account in its own room on your Mac, fully isolated. Each one is the real Gmail web UI, with Calendar, Drive, Meet, and Gemini. No server, no subscription: pay once ($19 launch price, $89 after). Switch with ⌘1-9. Native Swift, a 12 MB app. 14-day free trial, no card needed.

posts.name: PopTask for Apple
posts.tagline: Turn to-dos into scheduled tasks
posts.description: PopTask just went universal. type a messy thought like "gym mon wed fri 6am" and it becomes a scheduled task in about 3 seconds, no pickers, no forms. on iphone + ipad you get home and lock screen widgets, a live activity + dynamic island counting down your next task, control center, and hands-free siri even in the car. on mac it lives in the menu bar (⌘⌃P). everything syncs across your devices through your own icloud, near-instant. on-device, private, 9 languages. free to start

posts.name: agents-cli
posts.tagline: The CLI your coding agent uses to ship agents
posts.description: One command-line tool to scaffold, evaluate, and deploy AI agents on Google Cloud — built to be driven by your coding agent (e.g Antigravity, Claude Code, Codex). Scaffold a production-ready project, evaluate against a real signal, and ship to Agent Runtime, Cloud Run, or GKE or anywhere else!

posts.name: Orus
posts.tagline: Claude for investing in perpetuals
posts.description: Orus is an MCP server that puts your Farao trading account inside any AI chat. Connect WhatsApp, Telegram, Claude, ChatGPT, or Grok via OAuth and get full market research + execution across 100+ markets — crypto perps, tokenized stocks (Tesla, Nvidia), FX, and commodities. Funds stay in your self-custodial wallet. Choose manual confirmation per trade or set autonomous limits. Every session is tracked and revocable from the Farao app.

posts.name: New small business tools by IFTTT
posts.tagline: Run your business with HubSpot, Figma, and more
posts.description: A whole new stack of business tools just hit IFTTT. Connect HubSpot, Figma, Customer.io, Xero, FreshBooks, SendGrid, Apollo, and 13 more to automate the parts of running a business that eat up your time. Whether you're onboarding a new hire, sending invoices, launching a product, or keeping your website up, it all runs once connected. Even your domain expiration won't catch you off guard. Hook it all up to Slack, Google Sheets, SMS, and more.

posts.name: Universal-3.5 Pro
posts.tagline: The most accurate STT model from AssemblyAI.
posts.description: Universal-3.5 Pro is AssemblyAI's most accurate speech-to-text model, now available at our Realtime & Async endpoints. It transcribes every conversation exactly as it's heard—code-switching across 18 languages, our most accurate speaker diarization yet, and contextual prompting to steer results.

posts.name: Notion Agents iOS app
posts.tagline: Chat with Notion Agents anytime
posts.description: A voice note. A photo of a napkin sketch. A question at 11pm. All handled before you're back at your desk. Get answers from all your connected tools and Notion docs, databases, and projects on the go. Capture ideas with text, voice, or photos, and let agents organize them for you. Take quick actions like creating pages, drafting updates, or searching across your connected tools—all from a simple chat.

posts.name: NanoKVM-Go
posts.tagline: Give your AI agent physical control over any screen
posts.description: NanoKVM-Go is a watch-sized, serverless 4K KVM with WiFi 6 and built-in Tailscale. It acts as an open MCP server to give AI agents hardware-level screen visibility and keyboard/mouse input control over any connected laptop or mobile device.

posts.name: Eodly
posts.tagline: Know what your team actually shipped today
posts.description: Eodly reads Slack, Telegram, Discord, GitHub and Linear, and sends founders one sourced page each evening: who shipped, who's quiet, who's slipping, and any status that doesn't match reality. Your team never logs in. A chief of staff, not surveillance.

posts.name: Compendium
posts.tagline: Keeping your team, agents, and data on one page
posts.description: Compendium is a company brain for teams working with AI agents. With compendium, all your agents share one memory, so knowledge, decisions, and context are available to everyone, everywhere, instantaneously. Compendium allows you to work in shared sessions where you and your teammates' agents build on the same context instead of siloed threads, get summaries of what changed while you were away (without digging), and have a live view of what your teammates and their agents are building right now.

posts.name: Knowledge Atlas by Fini
posts.tagline: The self-learning knowledge base that improves itself
posts.description: Fini's self-maintaining knowledge layer. It writes help articles from resolved tickets, flags conflicts, and grounds every AI answer in one cited source.

posts.name: Jamboree
posts.tagline: Multiplayer synthesizer
posts.description: A multiplayer sound design tool. Fully browser-based with true peer-to-peer networking, SoundFont export, and live cursors/chat so you can shape patches with others in real time. Comes with a real synth engine: 5-shape oscillator, resonant filter, full ADSR amp envelope, and an LFO routable to filter or amp for evolving, moving sounds.

posts.name: On-Device Field Extraction by Veryfi
posts.tagline: Secure on-device extraction even if you're offline
posts.description: Today we're introducing On-Device Field Detection, a new capability in the Veryfi Lens SDK that validates receipts the moment they're captured, not after they've been uploaded, processed, and potentially rejected. It's a small shift in when validation happens, and it changes a lot about what happens next.

posts.name: TypeUI
posts.tagline: Build better UI with AI
posts.description: TypeUI is an agent-first product that you can use with your favorite AI tools like Claude, Codex, and Cursor to start building UI that makes sense an converts users using human-curated design skills and prompts.

posts.name: Denker
posts.tagline: Your AI coworker that follows where you work
posts.description: Denker is the AI coworker that follows where you work. Agents see your screen, coordinate around shared context, and execute across your desktop. You direct from your cursor — no prompts to manage, no tools to switch — and results arrive where you are.

posts.name: Jobply
posts.tagline: Apply to better-fit jobs faster with AI
posts.description: Jobply is a completely free AI job search assistant that helps you create one profile, discover fresh AI-matched jobs, generate tailored resumes and cover letters, and autofill applications across Workday, Greenhouse, Lever, Ashby, SmartRecruiters, BambooHR, and BreezyHR. New jobs are inserted every single hour, so you can keep finding real openings without rewriting the same details again and again.

posts.name: SPUN
posts.tagline: AI-powered platform for online visa applications
posts.description: SPUN is an online visa platform designed to simplify global mobility with a seamless, user-friendly experience. Our intuitive interface makes it easy to explore and purchase over 300 visas for 90+ countries, get personalized guidance through an AI-powered assistant, and complete forms effortlessly with automation. By combining great design with powerful automation, we remove the frustration from visa applications—so you can focus on the journey, not the paperwork.

posts.name: Wine Matcher
posts.tagline: AI sommelier for full dinner recipes, not just wine notes
posts.description: Most wine apps work backwards: pick a dish, get a wine. Wine Matcher flips that. Scan any wine label and get an instant breakdown of what you're drinking (grape, region, tasting notes) in plain English, no wine-snob jargon. Then get a full course menu built around that exact bottle, appetizer to dessert, with real recipes. No wine on hand? Swipe through occasion-based pairings (date night, movie night, having people over) instead. Your pocket sommelier and menu planner, in one scan.

posts.name: MindHunt AI
posts.tagline: AI recruitment tool built by a recruiter. Finally.
posts.description: Most recruiting tools were built by engineers who never placed a candidate. I spent 20 years as a recruiter using those tools — and every single one, I could see exactly what was wrong with it. Not as an engineer. As someone who actually had to find a CFO by Friday. So I built MindHunt AI — type who you need in plain English, AI finds candidates, fetches contacts, writes personalized outreach, and tracks everything. One tool. No tab switching. Works the moment you sign up. Free to try.

posts.name: Inkling
posts.tagline: Track the hires and departures that signal what's next
posts.description: Every strategic move shows up in the people first — a hiring spree, a quiet exit, someone flipping to 'open to work.' Inkling watches the people inside every company that matters to you (rivals, targets, portfolio) and turns public professional profiles into one ranked briefing a week, with same-day alerts and 'always-on' company pages for the moves that can't wait. Built for competitive, investor, and operator intel. Public data only.

posts.name: vivie club
posts.tagline: design, browse, share fashion with ai tool, idea-> garment
posts.description: vivie is where fashion design stops being gatekept by skill/software. most "ai fashion" tools treat clothing like a prompt-to-image gimmick. vivie treats it like a design tool with easy setup. Studio — generate original garment designs with AI Library — browse fashion history for reference and inspiration Community — post designs, join themed rounds, get ranked Built for anyone who's ever redesigned an outfit in their head and wanted proof it could exist. would love some feedback and support!

posts.name: BoltSEO
posts.tagline: Google traffic, without the content team.
posts.description: BoltSEO reads your site, finds winnable keywords, writes SEO articles in your brand voice, and auto-publishes them to WordPress, Shopify or Webflow. Built for small businesses that can't afford a €1,500/mo agency. Free to start — 3 articles, no credit card.

posts.name: Korvi
posts.tagline: Paste your URL, get a full marketing strategy in minutes
posts.description: Most marketing tools give you templates or generic advice. Korvi reads your actual website and your real competitors, then builds a full strategy: positioning, content plan, social posts, and a ranked action plan — tailored to your business, not a one-size-fits-all playbook. Built for founders and small teams without a marketing hire. Paste your URL, get a working plan in minutes — no consultant calls, no generic templates. Plans start at $19/month

posts.name: Cold Mail Server
posts.tagline: Managed email infrastructure for your cold outreach
posts.description: Dedicated, isolated mail servers for outbound email. Unlimited domains and mailboxes from $49/mo. No warm-up, no bans, built-in Unibox. Cheaper than every alternative.

posts.name: FanBase
posts.tagline: The AI Copilot that turns social followers into customers
posts.description: Introducing FanBase, the AI platform for social marketing. Most tools rely on workflows you set up and launch. FanBase runs an AI Copilot that plugs into your socials through official Meta, X and TikTok APIs and actually learns: your voice, your audience, who your loyal followers are, and which are worth converting. It automates comment-to-DM, builds a profile for every follower, flags buying intent, and drafts replies to your comments and DMs.

posts.name: Creatorfield AI
posts.tagline: Generate 100+ videos with a single click
posts.description: CreatorField is an AI platform that generates 100+ short-form videos from a single prompt or piece of content. Unlike traditional AI video tools that create one video at a time, CreatorField produces multiple ready-to-post variations with different hooks, styles, avatars, voices, and captions - making it easy to scale content across TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts in one click.

posts.name: WisyLink
posts.tagline: Create real websites, apps, and games with chatting AI
posts.description: WisyLink turns a chat into a live website, app, or tool — no code. Hosted on its own address, with a real backend already wired in: accounts, a database, payment collection, and file storage, plus live updates and multiplayer when you need them. Bring your own domain or use a WisyLink one. Keep shaping it by chatting — the link never changes. Free to start, on web, iOS, and Android.

posts.name: MoveNow (Add-on for Blender)
posts.tagline: Make Any Character Move in 1 Click, Guaranteed.
posts.description: MoveNow is a powerful Blender add-on designed for effortless animation retargeting. It automatically applies professional-grade motions to your rigged characters with minimal effort—no manual bone mapping required in most cases. It seamlessly supports AI-generated SMPL/SMPL-X data, Unreal Engine animations, Rokoko, VRoid, Mixamo, and EasyMocap. It is perfect for Indie animators, game developers, VTubers, 3D artists, and creators needing fast, reliable character animation.

posts.name: webdog.ai
posts.tagline: Open source web monitoring service
posts.description: Webdog.ai watches any website and tells you the moment it changes; new links, removed links, content edits, or price drops. Every check is powered by Context.dev's web APIs: clean markdown scraping, product & price extraction, live page screenshots, and AI-written summaries that explain what changed and why it matters. Add a monitor in seconds (just paste a URL), get alerts via Slack, email, or webhooks, and share a read-only page. Open-source, self-hostable, PostgreSQL-backed.

posts.name: LGTM — Looks Good To Meow
posts.tagline: Security-first AI that reviews entire repo, not just diffs
posts.description: LGTM reviews every pull request with specialized AI agents, runs 16 CI/CD security detectors, and ships a Runtime Watchdog that catches what static analysis misses. Unlike diff-only reviewers, it reads your entire codebase (tree-sitter + PageRank) so reviews understand context, not just syntax. Built for 5–50 dev teams. 🐱

makers.name: looksgoodtomeow
makers.headline: Security first AI reviews your repo

posts.name: OB-1
posts.tagline: Free coding agent. No account, no card, no API key.
posts.description: OB-1 is an open-source coding agent for your terminal. Install it and start with no account, no card, no API key. Its free tier is a router built into the CLI that pools 162 free models across 22 providers, so no single vendor can pull the plug. After every change it runs your project's checks and fixes what broke until they pass. For frontier models, paid plans are prepaid credits, hard-capped, so no bill can run past the number you set. Install: brew install overbrilliant/tap/ob1

posts.name: Nexting
posts.tagline: Command Claude Code & Codex from anywhere with voice
posts.description: Nexting is a voice-first iOS app and wearable interface for Claude Code, Codex, OpenClaw, and your own AI agent workflows. Start from the iOS app to send tasks and track progress from your phone. Use Nexting PIN to dispatch tasks by voice even when your phone is locked. BYOA is free and end-to-end encrypted by default. PIN is available now for $129, with Ring in private beta.

posts.name: Instro
posts.tagline: Music App for focus, flow, and momentum
posts.description: Instro is a place to listen to instrumental music without having to think about playlists, artists, or what comes next. It's designed for coding, reading, and focused work, when music should support your attention instead of competing for it. Instro avoids complexity on purpose. There are no playlists to manage, no algorithms pushing novelty, and no pressure to interact. You start listening, and the music stays out of the way.

posts.name: Milk Monster
posts.tagline: The baby tracker two parents actually share, live
posts.description: Milk Monster is a calm, shared baby tracker built for two parents — log feeds, sleep, diapers and pumping in one tap, and every caregiver sees it live, in real time. Free to start. And it’s not just your phone — sign in at my.milkmonster.app to see the whole week as charts on your laptop, and print a clean one-pager for the pediatrician.

makers.name: Erick Johnson
makers.headline: New dad who built Milk Monster!

posts.name: Clear Cortex
posts.tagline: The AI workspace where your files, notes and data connect
posts.description: Models raced ahead but the interface is stuck at the chatbot — a single thread that forgets your context and locks you to one lab. Clear Cortex is an AI workspace: your files, notes, data and AI chats live together on one connected canvas. Drop in PDFs, spreadsheets, images and audio — everything you connect is what the AI knows, answers cited to the exact page. The best model for each task, on one bill. Share the workspace, not a transcript. The AI comes to your work — not the other way around.

posts.name: OpenFedNow
posts.tagline: Free dual-rail FedNow + RTP middleware for community banks
posts.description: 73% of U.S. financial institutions still can't send instant payments. The bottleneck is integration complexity, not intent. OpenFedNow is free Apache 2.0 middleware giving any bank or credit union a dual-rail FedNow + RTP integration from a single codebase. Pre-built adapters for Fiserv, FIS, and Jack Henry cover ~72% of U.S. banks. Built by someone who shipped PIX infrastructure at Santander Brazil — now 63B transactions/year.

posts.name: Bingeable
posts.tagline: AI agent that turns one prompt into a product tutorial video
posts.description: Bingeable is the first AI video agent for SaaS teams. Type what you want to teach — "show how to connect a Stripe account" — and the agent opens your live product in a real browser, performs the workflow (clicking, typing, navigating), narrates every step with studio-quality voiceover, and renders a polished tutorial video. Then edit by typing, translate to 15 languages, turn into shorts, and publish to YouTube, LinkedIn, or your help center. No recording. No editing. No video team needed.

posts.name: Cray
posts.tagline: Stablecoin payments for merchants
posts.description: Cray is a compliant, non-custodial stablecoin payment solution built for merchants. They can accept payments from any crypto wallet, across chains, instantly and at low cost, with no crypto knowledge needed. All they need is the Cray app. Existing crypto payment tools only solve parts of the problem, and overlook retail merchants. But Cray focuses on usability, removing the crypto complexity of tokens and chains through a seamless "one-balance" experience for both merchants and users.

posts.name: AutoDoc
posts.tagline: Open source AI meeting notes that never leave your computer
posts.description: AutoDoc is a fully open-source AI meeting assistant that runs totally offline — no bot joins your call, and nothing ever leaves your computer. It records your screen, mic, and system audio, then uses local AI (Whisper + Ollama) to transcribe and summarize. Notes stay synced to the video, so when someone shares a slide deck or dashboard, you can jump straight to that moment instead of just reading that it happened. macOS available now, Windows coming soon.

posts.name: Bunny Ears TV
posts.tagline: Your Plex Library. Live Television.
posts.description: Bunny Ears TV transforms your Plex media server into 425+ curated live TV channels and 68 music stations with a retro program guide. No setup, no server config. Download free on the App Store for Apple TV.

posts.name: Tradechecx
posts.tagline: Trading Discipline Enforcing software for forex traders
posts.description: TradeChecx is a forex trading journal and trading discipline software built for retail forex traders, prop firm traders, funded traders, and MT4/MT5 users. The platform enforces pre-set trading rules automatically, tracks drawdown in real time, and provides performance analytics to help traders build consistency and eliminate emotional decision-making. Features include automated rule enforcement, MT4/MT5 integration discipline scoring, and risk management tools. Founded by HEXTECH ALGO.

posts.name: Jot
posts.tagline: One keystroke to catch a thought before it's gone
posts.description: A thought hits mid-task. Press Option+Space, type it, press Command+Return, and it's saved to a searchable log on your Mac, without leaving the app you're in. On-device, no account, permission-free. macOS 14+. $4.99 one-time, no subscription. Product Hunt launch: 40% off with code PHLAUNCHJOT, limited availability.

posts.name: BackSpin - Open AI Attention Exchanges
posts.tagline: Devs earn during AI waits. Advertisers reach them right then
posts.description: Most dev-tool ads are one-sided: the tool shows you ads, you get nothing. BackSpin flips that into a two-sided exchange, developers opt in and earn a share of revenue for the attention they give during AI wait states. It's private by design, never reading your code, prompts, or AI responses, and detecting AI activity from content-free signals only. It works everywhere you do: editors, CLIs, MCP hosts, and the browser. And every integration is opt-in and reversible, uninstalling cleanly.

makers.name: Rizaldy Putra
makers.headline: Founder @ KSATRIA Corp. Dev tools & more

posts.name: GribGrab
posts.tagline: A 7-day hourly weather chart for any place on Earth
posts.description: GribGrab shows a 7-day hourly weather chart (a meteogram) for any location worldwide — temperature, feels-like, precipitation, wind and gusts, pressure, and cloud cover, all on one timeline. Below the chart, a plain-language "next 24 hours" summary tells you what each part of the day will feel like and how it compares to yesterday. Free, no account, installable, works offline.

posts.name: Thunzi AI
posts.tagline: AI-powered reputation, and customer experience intelligence
posts.description: Thunzi AI is an end-to-end AI reputation intelligence platform for African organisations. It monitors media, web, social conversations, sentiment shifts, AI visibility, customer feedback, and emerging narratives, then turns them into alerts, dashboards, reports, and response workflows. It helps brands, SMEs, agencies, institutions, governments, and public figures detect reputation risks early, understand public perception, and improve customer experience before issues become crises.

posts.name: EaseAssign
posts.tagline: Hire, freelance, and collaborate, all in one workspace.
posts.description: EaseAssign is a freelancing platform built for how people actually work. Clients can post tasks, freelancers can find opportunities, and both collaborate in one workspace with real-time chat, milestones, Kanban boards, project dashboards, and reviews. Unlike traditional marketplaces that stop after hiring, EaseAssign focuses on helping projects get completed smoothly from start to finish.

posts.name: AutoCompress
posts.tagline: Auto Compress Files While Uploading Locally
posts.description: Hey Product Hunt 👋 I built Auto Compress to fix a common upload headache: files getting rejected for being too large. Instead of using separate compression websites, it automatically compresses files right before upload, directly in your browser. Your files stay on your device, making it faster and more private for resumes, documents, images, forms, and portals. Would love your feedback!

posts.name: Quip
posts.tagline: 86-minute podcast, viral shorts in ~5 minutes
posts.description: Quip turns long videos into short vertical clips, and tells you why each one will land. Explainable AI clips with a hook, a confidence score, and the reason it works.

posts.name: Asesorio - Invoicing & Tax Determination
posts.tagline: Send tax-compliant invoices from your phone. Free.
posts.description: Existing Spanish invoicing tools are desktop apps with a bolted-on mobile view. Asesorio is genuinely mobile-first — quote, invoice and get paid from your phone on the job, nothing to install. And instead of making you a tax expert, its engine determines the correct tax automatically for every case (IVA, IGIC, IPSI, recargo de equivalencia, IRPF, reverse charge), so any autónomo or SMB issues a correct, VeriFactu-compliant invoice — no spreadsheets, no gestor, no fiscal know-how required.

posts.name: FreeViralKit
posts.tagline: AI does your YouTube SEO so you can just make videos
posts.description: Coming up with a good YouTube title shouldn't take longer than editing the video. FreeViralKit is a free AI toolkit — 15+ tools and counting — that handles titles, descriptions, hashtags, and tags in seconds. No paywalls, no sign-up, no catch. Built by a solo dev who got tired of watching good videos flop because of bad SEO. Paste your topic, get options, upload with confidence.

posts.name: Everything They Told You About Sales
posts.tagline: The Myths And Mistakes That Cost Businesses Millions
posts.description: Think business is logical? Think again. Through thirty years of commercial war stories, Grant Stanley exposes the myths that cost organisations millions. From sales trainers who can't sell to KPIs that reward failure, this witty, evidence-driven book reveals why trust, common sense and understanding people consistently outperform scripts, buzzwords and corporate theatre. You'll laugh, wince and probably recognise your own workplace.

posts.name: PhishRadar
posts.tagline: The phishing response platform that closes the loop.
posts.description: PhishRadar is a comprehensive phishing detection and response platform that automates threat analysis from inbox to SIEM Whether a threat is flagged by a user, caught by our browser extension, or scanned via Outlook, PhishRadar analyzes emails in under 30 seconds using AI and multi-engine heuristics. posts.name: Storytime
posts.tagline: Local influencer campaigns for brick-and-mortar businesses
posts.description: Storytime matches brick-and-mortar businesses with vetted local creators. Set your offer and reach tiers, launch in under 5 minutes. Creators visit in person, post, and drive foot traffic — all tracked in a dashboard with impressions, EMV, and ROI. Businesses on Storytime have hit 1,030% ROI, 7x influencer growth, and 1M+ organic reach. Live across NYC.

posts.description: Most AI clippers wait for your VOD, then scan the transcript. ClipMe taps the live Kick HLS feed and cuts ranked clips during the broadcast - vision-ranked across 18 signals (chat spikes, reactions, the payoff), not transcript-only. Free founding-beta tier.

posts.name: Katpult AI
posts.tagline: AI SEO Content Generation Platform
posts.description: Katpult AI is an AI-native SEO & AEO content platform built for the way search works today. It learns your brand by reading your website, existing content, and your own inputs. It then researches Google, Reddit, and other online sources to identify trending topics, customer questions, and content gaps. By scanning your sitemap, it avoids duplicate content and recommends high-impact blog ideas your competitors are missing.

posts.name: Marsdrop
posts.tagline: Encrypted online file sharing with no accounts, no trace
posts.description: Marsdrop is privacy-first file sharing. Files are encrypted in your browser with AES-256, sent by link or peer-to-peer, and deleted on your terms — the server never sees your files or keys. Free to fly — send rocket fuel only if you want to.

posts.name: RankPine
